block.header: taginoupe no mipunenoyama ni miduye sasi sizini opwitaru twoga no kwi no iya tugitugini yoroduyo ni kaku si sirasamu miyosinwo no akidu no miya pa kamukara ka taputwoku aru ramu kunikara ka migaposiku a ramu yamakapa wo kiywomi sayakemi ube si kamuyo yu sadamekye rasi mo

sentence.transcription: mi ga posi ku a ramu

block.header: tosi no pa ni kaku mo mitesika miyosinwo no kiywoki kaputi no tagitu siranami
yama takami sirayupubana ni otitagitu taki no kaputi pa miredo akanu kamo
kamukara ka migaposika ramu miyosinwo no taki no kaputi pa miredo akanu kamo
miyosinwo no akidu no kapa no yoroduyo ni tayuru koto naku mata kapyerimimu
patusemye no tukuru yupubana miyosinwo no taki no minawa ni sakinikyerazu ya

umakori ayani tomosiku narukamwino oto nomwi kikisi miyosinwo no makwi tatu yama yu mioroseba kapa no se gotoni akekureba asagwiri tati yupu sareba kapadu naku nabe pimo tokanu tabi ni si areba wa nomwi site kiywoki kapara wo miraku si wosi mo
taginoupe no mipunenoyama pa kasikwokyedo omopiwasururu toki mo pi mo nasi

sentence.transcription: toki mo pi mo na si

block.header: tidori naku miyosinwogapa no kapaoto nasu yamu toki nasi ni omopoyuru kimi
akanesasu pi narabenaku ni wa ga kwopwi pa yosinwonokapa no kwiri ni tatitutu

yasumisisi wa go opokimi no tokomiya to tukapematureru sapikanwo yu sogapi ni miyuru oki tu sima kiywoki nagisa ni kaze pukeba siranami sawaki sipo pureba tamamo karitutu kamuyo ywori sika so taputwoki tamatusimayama

sentence.transcription: so ga pi ni mi yuru

block.header: oki tu sima ariswo no tamamo sipopwi miti kakuropiyukaba omopoyemu kamo
wakanoura ni sipo mitikureba kata wo nami asipye wo sasite tadu nakiwataru

asipikino miyama mo sayani otitagitu yosinwonokapa no kapa no se no kiywoki wo mireba kamibye ni pa tidori sibanaki simobye ni pa kapadu tuma ywobu momosikwino opomiyapito mo wotikoti ni sizini si areba miru gotoni ayani tomosimi tamakadura tayuru koto naku yoroduyo ni kaku si moga mo to ametuti no kamwi wo so inoru kasikwokaredomo
yoroduyo ni mi tomo akame ya miyosinwo no tagitu kaputi no opomiyatokoro
mwinapito no inoti mo wa ga mo miyosinwo no taki no tokipa no tune naranu kamo

yasumisisi wa go opokimi no takasirasu yosinwonomiya pa tatanaduku awokakigomori kapanami no kiywoki kaputi so parubye pa pana sakiwowori aki sareba kwiri tatiwataru so no yama no iya masumasuni ko no kapa no tayuru koto naku momosikwino opomiyapito pa tune ni kaywopamu
miyosinwo no kisayama no ma no konure ni pa kokoda mo sawaku tori no kowe kamo
nubatamano ywo no pukeyukeba pisagwi opuru kiywoki kapara ni tidori sibanaku

yasumisisi wa go opokimi pa miyosinwo no akidunowonwo no nwo no pe ni pa tomi suweokite miyama ni pa ime tatewatasi asagari ni sisi pumiokosi yupugari ni tori pumitate uma namete mikari so tatasu paru no sigenwo ni
asipikino yama ni mo nwo ni mo mikaribito satuya tabasami sawakitari miyu

sentence.transcription: yama ni mo nwo ni mo

block.header: ositeru nanipa no kuni pa asikakino purinisi satwo to pito mwina no omopiyasumite ture mo naku arisi apida ni umiwonasu nagara no miya ni makwipasira putwotakasikite wosu kuni wo wosametamapeba okitutori adipu no para ni mononopuno yaswotomonowo pa ipori site miyakwo nasitari tabi ni pa aredomo

sentence.transcription: ya swo tomo no wo pa

block.header: aranwora ni satwo pa aredomo opokimi no sikimasu toki pa miyakwo to narinu
amawotomye tana nasi wobune kogidu rasi tabi no yadori ni kadi no oto kikoyu

isanatori pamapye wo kiywomi utinabiki opuru tamamo ni asanagi ni tipyenami yori yupunagi ni ipopyenami yoru pye tu nami no iya sikusikuni tukwinikyeni pi ni pi ni mi tomo ima nomwi ni akidarame ya mo siranami no isakimegureru suminoye no pama

sentence.transcription: pi ni pi ni mi tomo

block.header: siranami no tipye ni kiyosuru suminoye no kwisi no panipu ni nipopite yukana

sentence.transcription: ti pye ni ki yosu ru

block.header: ametuti no topoki ga goto pitukwi no nagaki ga goto ositeru nanipanomiya ni wa go opokimi kuni sirasu rasi mike tu kuni pinomitukwi to apadi no nwosima no ama no wata no soko oki tu ikuri ni apabitama sapani kadukide pune namete tukapematuru si taputwosi mireba
asanagi ni kadi no oto kikoyu mike tu kuni nwosima no ama no pune ni si aru rasi

nakisumi no punase yu miyuru apadisima matuponoura ni asanagi ni tamamo karitutu yupunagi ni mosipo yakitutu amawotomye ari to pa kikedo mi ni yukamu yosi no nakyereba masurawo no kokoro pa nasi ni tawayamye no omopitawamite tamotopori ware pa so kwopuru punekadi wo nami
tamamo karu amawotomyedomo mi ni yukamu punekadi moga mo nami takaku tomo
yukimeguri mi tomo akame ya nakisumi no punase no pama ni sikiru siranami

yasumisisi wa go opokimi no kamunagara takasirasimasu inaminwo no opumi no para no aratape no pudiwi no ura ni sibi turu to amabune sawaki sipo yaku to pito so sapani aru ura wo yomi ube mo turi pa su pama wo yomi ube mo sipo yaku arigaywopi myesaku mo sirusi kiywoki sirapama
oki tu nami pyenami sidukemi izari su to pudiyenoura ni pune so sawakyeru
inaminwo no asadi osinabe sanuru ywo no kenagaku si areba ipye si sinwopayu
akasigata sipopwi no miti wo asu ywori pa sitawemasikyemu ipye tikadukeba

adisapapu imo ga mekarete sikitapeno makura mo makazu kanipa maki tukureru pune ni makadi nuki wa ga kogikureba apadi no nwosima mo sugwi inamituma karani no sima no sima no ma yu wagipye wo mireba awoyama no soko to mo miyezu sirakumo mo tipye ni narikinu kogitamuru ura no kotogoto yukikakuru sima no sakizaki kuma mo okazu omopi so wa ga kuru tabi no kenagami

sentence.transcription: soko to mo mi ye zu
ti pye ni nari ki nu

block.header: tamamo karu karani no sima ni simamwi suru u ni si mo are ya ipye omopazu aramu

sentence.transcription: u ni si mo are ya

block.header: simagakuri wa ga kogikureba tomosi kamo yamato pye noboru makumanwo no pune
kaze pukeba nami ka tatamu to samorapi ni tuda no posoye ni uragakuri wori

mikemukapu apadinosima ni tadamukapu minumyenoura no okipye ni pa pukamiru tori uramwi ni pa nanoriso karu pukamiruno mimaku posikyedo nanoriso no ono ga na wosimi matukapi mo yarazute ware pa ikyeri tomo nasi
suma no ama no sipoyakikinu no narenaba ka pitopi mo kimi wo wasurete omopamu

makuzu papu kasuganoyama pa utinabiku paru sariyuku to yama no pe ni kasumi tanabiki takamatwo ni ugupisu nakinu mononopuno yaswotomonowo pa karigane no kitugu ko no koro kaku tugite tune ni ariseba tomo namete aswobamu monowo uma namete yukamasi satwo wo matigateni wa ga sesi paru wo kakemaku mo ayani kasikwosi ipamaku mo yuyusiku aramu to arakazime kanete siriseba tidori naku so no sapogapa ni ipa ni opuru suga no ne torite sinwopukusa parapetemasi wo yuku midu ni misogitemasi wo opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi momosikwino opomiyapito no tamapokono miti ni mo idezu kwopuru ko no koro

sentence.transcription: ya swo tomo no wo pa
wa ga se si paru wo

block.header: ume yanagwi suguraku wosimi sapo no uti ni aswobisi koto wo miya mo todoroni
opokimi no sakapitamapu to yamamori suwe moru to ipu yama ni irazupa yamazi
miwataseba tikaki monokara iswogakuri kagaywopu tama wo torazupa yamazi
karakoromo ki nara no satwo no simamatu ni tama wo si tukemu yoki pito moga mo
sawosika no naku naru yama wo kwoyeyukamu pi dani ya kimi ni pata apazaramu
asita pa umibye ni asari si yupu sareba yamato pye kwoyuru kari si tomosi mo
sasutakeno opomiyapito no ipye to sumu saponoyama woba omopu ya mo kimi
yasumisisi wa go opokimi no wosu kuni pa yamato mo koko mo oyazi to so omopu
iza kwodomo kasipi no kata ni sirwotapeno swode sape nurete asana tumitemu
tokitukaze puku beku narinu kasipigata sipopwi no ura ni tamamo karitena
yukikapyeri tune ni wa ga misi kasipigata asu yu noti ni pa mimu yosi mo nasi

sentence.transcription: tune ni wa ga mi si
mi mu yosi mo na si

block.header: payapito no setwo no ipapo mo ayu pasiru yosinwo no tagi ni napo sikazukyeri
yunopara ni naku asitadu pa wa ga gotoku imo ni kwopure ya toki wakazu naku
okuyama no ipa ni koke musi kasikwoku mo twopitamapu kamo omopiapenaku ni
oponamuti sukunapikwona no kamwi kosoba nadukesomekyeme na nomwi wo nagwoyama to opite wa ga kwopwi no tipye no pitopye mo nagusamenaku ni

sentence.transcription: ti pye no pito pye mo

block.header: wa ga sekwo ni kwopureba kurusi itwoma araba piripite yukamu kwopwiwasuregapi
oponaraba kamokamo semu wo kasikwomito puriitaki swode wo sinobwite aru kamo

sentence.transcription: ka mo ka mo se mu wo

block.header: yamatodi pa kumogakuritari sikaredomo wa ga puru swode wo namyesi to mopu na
yamatodi no kibwi no kwosima wo sugwite yukaba tukusi no kwosima omopoyemu kamo
masurawo to omopyeru ware ya midukukwino midukwi no upe ni namita nogopamu
simasiku mo yukite mitesika kamunabwi no puti pa asenite se ni ka naru ramu
sasizumi no kurusu no wonwo no pagwi no pana tiramu toki ni si yukite tamukemu

sirakumo no tatutanoyama no tuyusimo ni iroduku toki ni utikwoyete tabi yuku kimi pa ipopyeyama iyukisakumi ata mamoru tukusi ni itari yama no soki nwo no soki miyo to tomonobye wo akatitukapasi yamabikwo no kotapemu kipami taniguku no sawataru kipami kunikata wo myesitamapite puyugomori paru sariyukaba tobu tori no payaku kimasane tatutadi no wokapye no miti ni nitutuzi no nipopamu toki no sakurabana sakinamu toki ni yamataduno mukapemawidemu kimi ga kimasaba

sentence.transcription: nwo no soki mi yo to

block.header: tiyorodu no ikusa nari tomo kotoage sezu torite kinu beki wonokwo to so omopu

wosu kuni no topono mikadwo ni imasira ga kaku makarinaba tapirakeku ware pa aswobamu tamudakite ware pa imasamu sumyera wa ga uduno mite moti kakinade so negwitamapu utinade so negwitamapu kapyerikomu pi apinomamu ki so ko no toyomiki pa

sentence.transcription: ko no toyo mi ki pa

block.header: masurawo no yuku to pu miti so oporokani omopite yuku na masurawo no tomo
kaku situtu araku wo yomi zo tamakiparu mizikaki inoti wo nagaku pori suru

sentence.transcription: ara ku wo yo mi zo

block.header: nanipagata sipopwi no nagori yoku mitemu ipye n aru imo ga matitwopamu tame
tadakwoye no ko no miti nisite ositeruya nanipa no umi to nadukekye rasi mo
wonokwo ya mo munasiku aru beki yoroduyo ni kataritugu beki na pa tatezusite
wa ga sekwo ga kyeru kinu ususi sapokaze pa itaku na puki so ipye ni itaru made
amagomori mikasanoyama wo takami ka mo tukwi no idekonu ywo pa kutatitutu
karitaka no takamatwoyama wo takami ka mo idekuru tukwi no osoku teru ramu
nubatamano ywogwiri no tatite opoposiku tereru tukuywo no mireba kanasisa
yama no pa no sasarayewotokwo ama no para two wataru pikari miraku si yosi mo

sentence.transcription: mi raku si yo si mo

block.header: kumogakuri yuku pye wo namito wa ga kwopuru tukwi wo ya kimi ga mimaku pori suru

sentence.transcription: yuku pye wo na mi to

block.header: ame ni masu tukuyomiwotokwo mapi pa semu koyopi no nagasa ipoywo tugikoso
pasikiyasi matikaki satwo no kimi komu to oponobwini ka mo tukwi no teritaru
matigateni wa ga suru tukwi pa imogakiru mikasanoyama ni komorite arikyeri
parukusa pa noti pa uturopu ipapo nasu tokipa ni imase taputwoki wa ga kimi
yakitati no kadwo utipanati masurawo no poku toyomiki ni ware wepinikyeri
sigewoka ni kamusabwitatite sakayetaru tiyomatu no kwi no tosi no siranaku

sentence.transcription: ti yo matu no kwi no

block.header: ipabasiri tagitinagaruru patusegapa tayuru koto naku mata mo kite mimu
purusatwo no asuka pa aredo awoniyosi nara no asuka wo miraku si yosi mo

sentence.transcription: mi raku si yo si mo

block.header: tukwi tatite tada mikadukwi no maywone kaki kenagaku kwopwisi kimi ni apyeru kamo
purisakete mikadukwi mireba pitome misi pito no maywobiki omopoyuru kamo
kaku situtu aswobi nomikoso kusakwi sura paru pa opwitutu aki pa tiriyuku
mitami ware ikyeru sirusi ari ametuti no sakayuru toki ni apyeraku omopeba
suminoye no kwopama no sizimi ake mo mizu komori ni nomwi ya kwopwiwatarinamu
maywo no goto kumowi ni miyuru apa no yama kakete kogu pune tomari sirazu mo
tinumwi ywori ame so purikuru sipatu no ama ami tetuna poseri nureapemu kamo
kwora ga araba putari kikamu wo oki tu su ni naku naru tadu no akatoki no kowe
masurawo pa mikari ni tatasi wotomyera pa akamo suswobiku kiywoki pamabwi wo
uma no ayumi osapetodomeyo suminoye no kwisi no panipu ni nipopite yukamu
amawotomye tama motomu rasi oki tu nami kasikwoki umi ni punade seri miyu

sentence.transcription: puna de s e ri miyu

block.header: omopoyezu kimasisi kimi wo sapogapa no kapadu kikasezu kapyesituru kamo

yasumisisi wa go opokimi no myesitamapu yosinwonomiya pa yama takami kumo so tanabiku kapa payami se no oto so kiywoki kamusabwite mireba taputwoku yorosinape mireba sayakesi ko no yama no tukwiba nomwi koso ko no kapa no tayeba nomwi koso momosikwino opomiyatokoro yamu toki mo arame

sentence.transcription: se no oto so kiywo ki

block.header: kamuyo ywori yosinwonomiya ni arigaywopi takasiraseru pa yamakapa wo yomi
kototopanu kwi sura imo to se ari to ipu wo tada pitorigwo ni aru ga kurusisa
yama no pa ni isaywopu tukwi no idemu ka to a ga matu kimi ga ywo pa kutatitutu
tatibana pa mwi sape pana sape so no pa sape ye ni simo puredo iya tokopa no kwi
okuyama no makwi no pa sinwogi puru yuki no puri pa masu tomo tuti ni otime ya mo

sentence.transcription: tuti ni oti me ya mo

block.header: wa ga yadwo no ume sakitari to tugeyaraba ko t ipu ni nitari tirinu tomo yosi

sentence.transcription: ko t ipu ni ni tari

block.header: paru sareba wowori ni wowori ugupisu no naku wa ga sima so yamazu kaywopase
arakazime kimi kimasamu to siramaseba kadwo ni yadwo ni mo tama sikamasi wo
wototupi mo kinopu mo kyepu mo mituredomo asu sape mimaku posiki kimi kamo
tama sikite matamasi ywori pa takyeswokani kitaru koyopi si tanwosiku omopoyu
unapara no topoki watari wo miyabwiwo no aswobu wo mimu to nadusapi so kosi
yuputatami tamuke no yama wo kyepu kwoyete idure no nwopye ni ipori semu ware
siratama pa pito ni sirayezu sirazu tomo yosi sirazu tomo ware si sireraba sirazu tomo yosi

iswonokami puru no mikoto pa tawayamye no matwopi ni yorite umazimono napa torituke sisizimono yumiya kakumite opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi amazakaru pinabye ni makaru purukoromo matutinoyama yu kapyerikonu kamo

opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi sasinarabu twosa no kuni ni idemasu ya wa ga se no kimi wo kakemaku mo yuyusikasikwosi suminoye no arapitogamwi punanope ni usipakitamapi tukitamapamu sima no sakizaki yoritamapamu iswo no sakizaki araki nami kaze ni apasezu tutumi naku yamapi arasezu sumuyakeku kapyesitamapane moto no kunipye ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga se no kimi wo

block.header: opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi sasinarabu twosa no kuni ni idemasu ya wa ga se no kimi wo kakemaku mo yuyusikasikwosi suminoye no arapitogamwi punanope ni usipakitamapi tukitamapamu sima no sakizaki yoritamapamu iswo no sakizaki araki nami kaze ni apasezu tutumi naku yamapi arasezu sumuyakeku kapyesitamapane moto no kunipye ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga se no kimi wo

block.header: titigimi ni ware pa managwo zo papatwozi ni ware pa managwo zo mawinoboru yaswoudipito no tamuke suru kasikwo no saka ni nusa maturi ware pa zo makaru topoki twosadi wo
oposaki no kamwi no wobama pa sebakyedomo momopunabito mo sugu to ipanaku ni
nagatwo n aru oki tu karisima okumapete wa ga mopu kimi pa titose ni moga mo
okumapete ware wo omopyeru wa ga sekwo pa titose ipotose arikosenu kamo
momosikwino opomiyapito pa kyepu mo ka mo itwoma wo namito satwo ni idezu aramu

sentence.transcription: satwo ni ide zu ara mu

block.header: tatibana no moto ni miti pumu yatimata ni mono wo so omopu pito ni sirayezu
masurawo no takamatwoyama ni semetareba satwo ni orikyeru muzasabi so kore
kapaguti no nwopye ni iporite ywo no pureba imo ga tamoto si omopoyuru kamo
imo ni kwopwi aga no matubara miwataseba sipopwi no kata ni tadu nakiwataru
okurenisi pito wo sinwopaku side no saki yupu torisidete sakiku to so omopu
opokimi no miyuki no manima wagimokwo ga tamakura makazu tukwi so penikyeru
mike tu kuni sima no ama na rasi makumanwo no wobune ni norite oki pye kogu miyu

sentence.transcription: sima no ama na ra si

block.header: inisipye yu pito no ipikyeru oipito no wotu to ipu midu so na ni opu taki no se

sentence.transcription: pito no ipi k ye ru
na ni opu taki no se

block.header: tadokapa no taki wo kiywomi ka inisipye yu miyatukapekyemu tagi no nwo no pe ni

sentence.transcription: tagi no nwo no pe ni

block.header: seki nakupa kapyeri ni dani mo utiyukite imo ga tamakura makite nemasi wo
ima tukuru kuninomiyakwo pa yamakapa no sayakeki mireba ube sirasu rasi
purusatwo pa topoku mo arazu pitopyeyama kwoyuru ga kara ni omopi so wa ga sesi

sentence.transcription: omopi so wa ga se si

block.header: wa ga sekwo to putari si woreba yama takami satwo ni pa tukwi pa terazu tomo yosi
pisakatano ame pa purisiku omopu kwo ga yadwo ni koyopi pa akasite yukamu
wa ga yadwo no kimi matu no kwi ni puruyukino yuki ni pa yukazi mati ni si matamu
pitotumatu ikuyo ka penuru puku kaze no oto no kiywoki pa tosi pukami ka mo

sentence.transcription: iku yo ka pe nu ru

block.header: tamakiparu inoti pa sirazu matu ga ye wo musubu kokoro pa nagaku to so omopu
kurenawi ni pukaku siminisi kokoro kamo naranomiyakwo ni tosi no penu beki

sentence.transcription: tosi no pe nu be ki

block.header: yononaka wo tunenaki mono to ima so siru naranomiyakwo no uturopu mireba
ipatunano mata wotikapyeri awoniyosi naranomiyakwo wo mata mo mimu kamo

yasumisisi wa go opokimi no takasikasu yamatonokuni pa sumyeroki no kamwi no miyo ywori sikimaseru kuni ni si areba aremasamu mikwo no tugitugi ame no sita sirasimasamu to yapoyorodu titose wo kanete sadamekyemu naranomiyakwo pa kagirwopwi no paru ni si nareba kasugayama mikasa no nwopye ni sakurabana konokure komori kapotori pa manaku sibanaku tuyusimono aki sarikureba ikwomayama tobupwigatake ni pagwi no ye wo sigaramitirasi sawosika pa tuma ywobitoyomu yama mireba yama mo migaposi satwo mireba satwo mo sumiyosi mononopuno yaswotomonowo no utipapete omopyerisiku pa ametuti no yoriapi no kagiri yoroduyo ni sakayeyukamu to omopyerisi opomiya sura wo tanomyerisi nara no miyakwo wo aratayo no koto ni si areba opokimi no piki no manima ni parupana no uturopikapari muratori no asadatiyukeba sasutakeno opomiyapito no puminarasi kaywopisi miti pa uma mo yukazu pito mo yukaneba arenikyeru kamo

sentence.transcription: ya swo tomo no wo no

block.header: tatikapari puruki miyakwo to narinureba miti no sibakusa nagaku opwinikyeri
natukinisi naranomiyakwo no areyukeba idetatu gotoni nageki si masaru

aki tu kamwi wa go opokimi no ame no sita yasima no uti ni kuni pa si mo sapani aredomo satwo pa si mo sapani aredomo yamanami no yorosiki kuni to kapanami no tatiapu satwo to yamasiro no kaseyama no ma ni miyabasira putwosikimaturi takasirasu putagi no miya pa kapa tikami se no oto zo kiywoki yama tikami tori ga ne toyomu aki sareba yama mo todoroni sawosika pa tuma ywobitoyome paru sareba wokapye mo sizini ipapo ni pa pana sakiwowori ana omosirwo putagi no para ito taputwo opomiyatokoro ube si koso wa go opokimi pa kiminagara kikasitamapite sasutakeno opomiya koko to sadamekye rasi mo

sentence.transcription: se no oto zo kiywo ki

block.header: mikanopara putagi no nwopye wo kiywomi koso opomiyatokoro sadamekye rasi mo
mikanopara putagi no nwopye wo kiywomi koso koko to sime sasi sadamekye rasi mo
yama takaku kapa no se kiywosi momoyo made kamusimwiyukamu opomiyatokoro

wa go opokimi kamwi no mikoto no takasirasu putagi no miya pa momokwi moku yama pa kodakasi otitagitu se no oto mo kiywosi ugupisu no kinaku parubye pa ipapo ni pa yamasita pikari nisiki nasu pana sakiwowori sawosika no tuma ywobu aki pa amagwirapu sigure wo itami saniturapu momiti tiritutu yatitose ni aretugasitutu ame no sita sirasimyesamu to momoyo ni mo kaparu masiziki opomiyatokoro

sentence.transcription: se no oto mo kiywo si

block.header: idumigapa yuku se no midu no tayeba koso opomiyatokoro uturopiyukame
putagiyama yamanami mireba momoyo ni mo kaparu masiziki opomiyatokoro
wotomyera ga umiwo kaku to ipu kasenoyama toki no yukyereba miyakwo to narinu
kasenoyama kodati wo sigemi asa sarazu kinaki toyomosu ugupisu no kowe
komayama ni naku pototogisu idumigapa watari wo topomi koko ni kaywopazu
komayama ni naku pototogisu idumigapa watari topomi ya kaywopazu aru ramu

mikanopara kuninomiyakwo pa yama takami kapa no se kiywomi sumiyosi to pito pa ipedomo ariyosi to ware pa omopedo purinisi satwo ni si areba kunimiredo pito mo kaywopazu satwo mireba ipye mo aretari pasikiyasi kaku arikyeru ka mimorotuku kaseyama no ma ni saku pana no iro medurasiku momotori no kowe natukasiku arigaposi sumiyoki satwo no aruraku wosi mo
mikanopara kuninomiyakwo pa arenikyeri opomiyapito no uturopinureba
saku pana no iro pa kaparazu momosikwino opomiyapito zo tatikaparikyeru

yasumisisi wa go opokimi no arigaywopu nanipanomiya pa isanatori umi katadukite tama piripu pamapye wo tikami asapapuru nami no oto sawaku yupunagi ni kadi no oto kikoyu akatoki no nezame ni kikeba ikuri no sipopwi no muta urasu ni pa tidori tuma ywobi asipye ni pa tadugane toyomu miru pito no katari ni sureba kiku pito no mimaku pori suru mikemukapu adipu no miya pa miredo akanu kamo
arigaywopu nanipanomiya pa umi tikami amawotomyera ga noreru pune miyu
sipo pureba asipye ni sawaku siratadu no tuma ywobu kowe pa miya mo todoroni

yatipoko no kamwi no miyo ywori momopune no paturu tomari to yasimakuni momopunapito no sadametesi minumyenoura pa asakaze ni uranami sawaki yupunami ni tamamo pa kiyoru siramanagwo kiywoki pamabye pa yukikapyeri miredomo akazu ube si koso miru pito gotoni kataritugi sinwopikye rasiki momoyo pete sinwopayeyukamu kiywoki sirapama
maswokagami minumyenoura pa momopune no sugwite yuku beki pama naranaku ni
pama kiywomi ura urupasimi kamuyo ywori tipune no paturu opowada no pama
